title: Asterian Origin
description: Datapack add-on for Origins mod. Become a Celestial being living on unfamiliar planet and control the mysterious power of Aster.
body:
### If there is some sort of issue with the origin, you have additional questions or are interested in my other works, feel free to [Join my Discord](https://discord.gg/Tu8UvDzqQG)

## Do you ever wanted to become a being straight out of this world? Well, now you can! I present to you:
# Asterian
Impact: 🟡🟡⚪️

_A race of celestial beings able to control the cosmic power of Aster._

🟡**Power of Aster** - Your entire existence is related to Aster. Aster will charge over time when you are able to see the sky - because that's where the Aster comes from. Recharge will be more efficient at night when you can take the power from invididual stars in the sky. If your Aster level is too low, you won't be able to run and you'll feel weak.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - You have Aster bar (140 points)
  - Slowly recharge Aster while exposed to the sky (1p/10tick)
  - Recharge is more efficient during the night (2p/10tick)
  - Recharge in the End is as efficient as during the night, but you don't need to be exposed to sky
  - No recharge in the Nether
  - No recharge while submerged in fluids
  - Weakness 2 and Slowness 2 effects while Aster is too low (20p or lower)

**Additional Info**: Resource bar is made out of 7 sections, which means that 20 points of Aster is equal to one section
</details>


🟡**Aster Diet** - Your race is incapable of feeling hunger, instead all kinds of fatigue takes its toll on your Aster. However, you can absorb the energy of some special items to recover some of your Aster. Just keep in mind, that you need a moment after taking damage to be able to consume these.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - Your hunger bar does nothing
  - Every aspect that hunger was used for now works for Aster instead
  - Every 8 seconds you can consume special items to recover some Aster
>- Glowstone/ Sea Lanterns (20p)
>- Glowstone Dust/ Prismarine Crystal/ Glow berries (10p)
  - After taking damage you can't consume items for 4 seconds
</details>

🟢**Aster Glow** - Spread some Aster around you, to coat everyone near in Aster Glow for 10 seconds. Your attacks against targets covered in glow will be more effective.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - You deal 3 additional damage points to enemies covered in Glow - both with melee and projectiles
  - Cover entities in 15 block radius in Glow for 10 seconds
  - Costs 30 Aster
  - Recharges 30 seconds
</details>

🟢**Aster Vision** - You can improve your vision in the dark by gradually emitting small portions of Aster and focusing on your eyes.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - Get Night Vision for the cost of Aster while ability is active
  - Won't work if Aster is lower than 40
  - Ability being active is signalised by Eye icon above your hunger bar
</details>

🟢**Star Eater** - As a Celestial being, you see Stars as the most precious resource. And it's just so happened that in this world there are Stars that you can put in your pocket. By consuming these you will free their power and cover yourself with powerful, protective cloak for a short duration, replenishing your Aster along the way.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - Once every 1 minute you can consume a Nether Star
  - Consuming a Nether Star will give you:
>- Resistance 3 for 20 seconds
>- Fully recharge your Aster supply
</details>

🟡**Low Gravity** - Your body is not accustomed to gravity of these lands, which means you are jumping higher and slowly falling to the ground. You can sneak in air to pull yourself towards the ground - but watch out, since doing so can hurt you.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - You have higher jump (2.5block)
  - Permanent slow falling, unless sneaking or flying with an elytra
  - Take increased damage from fall damage
  - Take increased damage from flying into things
</details>

🔴**Asterian Nature** - As an Asterian, your vitality is lower than that of a normal human on this planet.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - You have 9 hearts
</details>


### _Origins Datapacks just like this one work as add-ons for Origins Mod, supposed to expand the options provided by the mod._
